premarket.market_expectations: A mildly positive setup on the inputs that did come through this morning: GIFT Nifty and S&P futures are both firm, and DII buying continues. US 10Y yield and DXY couldn't be fetched this morning, so today's call leans on 7 of the usual 9 directional inputs.

news.headline_reworded: GIFT Nifty extends gains as US futures point to a firmer Wall Street open
news.why_it_matters: GIFT Nifty is one of the morning's clearest positive signals.

news.headline_reworded: Data vendor outage delays this morning's DXY and US 10-year yield feeds
news.why_it_matters: Two of today's inputs are unavailable; the signal table marks them and the bias call is based on what fetched successfully.

news.headline_reworded: Nifty holds onto morning gains to close modestly higher despite a quiet session
news.why_it_matters: The mild-Long morning call held through to the close, though gains were thin.

news.headline_reworded: Realty stocks slip on profit-taking after last week's sharp rally
news.why_it_matters: Realty was the session's only notable laggard sector.

eod.conclusion: Nifty closed up 0.22% at 24,489, a quiet session that held onto the morning's mild-Long call despite two missing data inputs. IT and Pharma led, Realty was the lone laggard after last week's rally, and breadth stayed mildly positive with advances ahead of declines.
